MOTION TO WITHDRAW $900,000.00 AND PLACE IN INTEREST BEARING ACCOUNT IS WITHDRAWN.PARTIES STIPULATE THAT FUNDS WILL REMAIN WITH THE PLAINTIFF IN AN INTEREST BEARING ACCOUNT WITH INTEREST ACCRUING FROM MARCH 4, 2002, TO BE FOR THE ACCOUNT OF THE DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS RESERVE THE RIGHT TO SEEK PAYMENT FROM PLAINTIFF OF INTEREST ACCRUED PRIOR TO MARCH 4, 2002.FUNDS ARE NOT TO BE WITHDRAWN WITHOUT A COURT ORDER. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MAY 10, 2002, 9AM, DEPT 304, TO SET FOR TRIAL. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER;CLERK-BBSURRATT;REPORTER-IRENE BURNS; (DEPT 304)
